title: Add pure graphStats helper and unit tests
description: Add a pure exported function graphStats(graph: Graph): { nodes: number; edges: number } to src/store/graph.ts returning { nodes: graph.nodes.length, edges: graph.edges.length }. No I/O, no console, no load() call. Add vitest unit tests asserting { nodes: 2, edges: 1 } for a 2-node/1-edge graph and { nodes: 0, edges: 0 } for an empty graph, importing from ../store/graph.js.
